description_long: This is a black, horned helmet reminiscent of those associated with Viking or fantasy warrior aesthetics. The helmet features a smooth, rounded dome with a central ridge running from front to back, adorned with a series of rivets along the seams. Two large, upward-curving horns extend symmetrically from either side, giving it a dramatic and intimidating appearance. The front of the helmet displays a small, red triangular emblem or accent below the central ridge, adding a subtle decorative touch. The surface appears metallic and slightly glossy, with visible rivet details enhancing its rugged look. There are no visible ventilation holes, visors, or retention systems on the exterior.
description: A black, metallic helmet with large, curved horns and a central ridge adorned with rivets. Features a small red accent on the front and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large horns, the central ridge with rivets, and a small red triangular accent below the ridge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of one horn and the smooth, rounded back of the helmet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical curve of both horns and the central ridge running down the back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other horn and the helmet's rounded contour.
